de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class IntermediateProofReplayer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.IntermediateProofReplayer

  • public class IntermediateProofReplayer
extends Object
    This class is responsible for generating a KeY proof from an intermediate representation generated by IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser.

    Replay is started using replay(). In the course of replaying, new nodes are added to the supplied proof object. The last goal touched during replay can be obtained by getLastSelectedGoal(). TODO: Check if joining with more than one partner works out of the box. Potential problem: Different order may result in syntactically different nodes.

    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer
    See Also:
    IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      (package private) static class  IntermediateProofReplayer.BuiltInConstructionException
      Signals an error during construction of a built-in rule app.
      (package private) static class  IntermediateProofReplayer.Result
      Simple structure containing the results of the replay procedure.
      (package private) static class  IntermediateProofReplayer.SkipSMTRuleException
      Signals that the execution of an SMT solver, that has been used before the now loaded proof was saved, has been skipped.
      (package private) static class  IntermediateProofReplayer.TacletConstructionException
      Signals an error during construction of a taclet app.

      • IntermediateProofReplayer

                         Proof proof,
                         IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser.Result parserResult)

        proof - The proof object into which to load the replayed proof.
        intermediate -

    • Method Detail

      • getLastSelectedGoal

        public Goal getLastSelectedGoal()
        Returns:
        the lastSelectedGoal

      • replay

        public IntermediateProofReplayer.Result replay()
        Starts the actual replay process. Results are stored in the supplied proof object; the last selected goal may be obtained by getLastSelectedGoal().

      • addChildren

        private void addChildren(Iterator<Node> children,
               LinkedList<NodeIntermediate> intermChildren)
        Adds the pairs of proof node children and intermediate children to the queue. At the moment, they are added in the order they were parsed. For the future, it may be sensible to choose a different procedure, for instance one that minimizes the number of open goals per time interval to save memory. Note that in this case, some test cases might be adapted which depend on fixed node serial numbers.
        Parameters:
        children - Iterator of proof node children.
        intermChildren - List of corresponding intermediate children.

      • getStatus

        public String getStatus()
        Communicates a non-fatal condition to the caller. Empty string means everything is OK. The message will be displayed to the user in the GUI after the proof has been parsed.

      • getErrors

        public Collection<Throwable> getErrors()
        Returns:
        errors encountered during replay.

      • constructTacletApp

        private TacletApp constructTacletApp(TacletAppIntermediate currInterm,
                           Goal currGoal)
                              throws IntermediateProofReplayer.TacletConstructionException
        Constructs a taclet application from an intermediate one.
        Parameters:
        currInterm - The intermediate taclet application to create a "real" application for.
        currGoal - The goal on which to apply the taclet app.
        Returns:
        The taclet application corresponding to the supplied intermediate representation.
        Throws:
        IntermediateProofReplayer.TacletConstructionException - In case of an error during construction.

      • constructBuiltinApp

        private IBuiltInRuleApp constructBuiltinApp(BuiltInAppIntermediate currInterm,
                                  Goal currGoal)
                                     throws IntermediateProofReplayer.SkipSMTRuleException,
                                            IntermediateProofReplayer.BuiltInConstructionException
        Constructs a built-in rule application from an intermediate one.
        Parameters:
        currInterm - The intermediate built-in application to create a "real" application for.
        currGoal - The goal on which to apply the built-in app.
        Returns:
        The built-in application corresponding to the supplied intermediate representation.
        Throws:
        IntermediateProofReplayer.SkipSMTRuleException - If the proof has been loaded, but the SMT solvers have not been run.
        IntermediateProofReplayer.BuiltInConstructionException - In case of an error during construction.

      • reportError

        private void reportError(String string,
               Throwable e)
        Stores an error in the list.
        Parameters:
        string - Description text.
        e - Error encountered.

      • collectAppsForRule

        private static ImmutableSet<IBuiltInRuleApp> collectAppsForRule(String ruleName,
                                               Goal g,
                                               PosInOccurrence pos)
        Retrieves all registered applications at the given goal and position for the rule corresponding to the given ruleName.
        Parameters:
        ruleName - Name of the rule to find applications for.
        g - Goal to search.
        pos - Position of interest in the given goal.
        Returns:
        All matching rule applications at pos in g.

      • constructInsts

        private static TacletApp constructInsts(TacletApp app,
                       Goal currGoal,
                       LinkedList<String> loadedInsts,
                       Services services)
        Instantiates schema variables in the given taclet application.
        Parameters:
        app - The taclet application to instantiate.
        currGoal - The corresponding goal.
        loadedInsts - Loaded schema variable instantiations.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        The instantiated taclet.

      • lookupName

        private static SchemaVariable lookupName(ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> set,
                        String name)
        Finds a schema variable in the given set.
        Parameters:
        set - The set to search.
        name - The name to search for.
        Returns:
        The found schema variable, or null if it is not present in the set.

      • parseTerm

        public static Term parseTerm(String value,
             Proof proof,
             Namespace varNS,
             Namespace progVar_ns)
        Parses a given term in String representation.
        Parameters:
        value - String to parse.
        proof - Proof object (for namespaces and Services object).
        varNS - Variable namespace.
        progVar_ns - Program variable namespace.
        Returns:
        The parsed term.
        Throws:
        ParserException - In case of an error.

      • parseTerm

        public static Term parseTerm(String value,
             Proof proof)
        Parses a given term in String representation.
        Parameters:
        value - String to parse.
        proof - Proof object (for namespaces and Services object).
        Returns:
        The parsed term.

      • parseSV1

        public static TacletApp parseSV1(TacletApp app,
                 SchemaVariable sv,
                 String value,
                 Services services)
        Instantiates a schema variable in the given taclet application. 1st pass: only VariableSV.
        Parameters:
        app - Application to instantiate.
        sv - Schema variable (VariableSV) to instantiate.
        value - Name for the instantiated logic variable.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        An instantiated taclet application, where the schema variable has been instantiated by a logic variable of the given name.

      • parseSV2

        public static TacletApp parseSV2(TacletApp app,
                 SchemaVariable sv,
                 String value,
                 Goal targetGoal)
        Instantiates a schema variable in the given taclet application. 2nd pass: All other schema variables.
        Parameters:
        app - Application to instantiate.
        sv - Schema variable to instantiate.
        value - Name for the instantiated Skolem constant, program element or term..
        targetGoal - The goal corresponding to the given application.
        Returns:
        An instantiated taclet application, where the schema variable has been instantiated, depending on its type, by a Skolem constant, program element, or term of the given name.
        See Also:
        parseSV1(TacletApp, SchemaVariable, String, Services)
